tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/csharpReferences ignores syntax nodes that are not supported C# reference shapes
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/csharpReferences reads member access references from the expression field and records resolved uppercase types
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/csharpReferences falls back to the first named child for member access expressions without an expression field
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/csharpReferences reads object creation references from the type field
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/csharpReferences skips missing, lowercase, and unresolved C# type references
